Content:
Explanation of the philosophy behind Mirror Report AI:
• Create reports from existing reports
• OCR is a means to an end
• Template generation is the objective

• openpyxl

• How to utilize generation AI
Person in Charge B:

• HTML template generation
• Form reproduction using CSS
• How to utilize the generation AI
